carriers increasing their flights will be common.
On can see the launch of one or more cost-cutting air carriers. -.{true}
Pharma: It will see new records in the exports in spite of the patent regime coming to
end. Also the Indian Pharma will do well. They will also establish their flags in new

countries. Indian R&D will be on the increase. There will be minor hue and cry
amongst multinationals, which will all come down. The alternative medicine will see
even healthy growth of more than 20%. -.{true, pharma stocks doing well}
Information technology: It will do well. There will be record level orders. A and B
sector will do really well. The main companies will make new peaks and records in
terms of sales, profits and turnover. We will be moving more towards high-end
products. More multinational companies will set up shop or will recruit more people.
The outsourcing boom will continue.
